chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C.P. No.D-928 of 2025. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A.No.4957/2025. 2. For orders on office objections as Flag ‘A’. 3. For orders on M.A.No.4958/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 09.09.2025. Mr. Amanullah Luhur Baloch, advocate a/w petitioner. -.-.-.-.- Through this petition, the petitioner Mst. Irshadan has sought for the following relief(s): a) That this Hon’ble Court may be pleased to direct the respondents to depute DSP Abdul Qudoos Kalwar as per order 05.08.2025 passed by the learned 1st Additional Sessions Judge/Justice of Peace Shikarpur for conducting re-investigation of the case bearing Crime No.75/2025 Police Station Khanpur under Sections 395, 365, 427, 454, 148, 149, 220 PPC as well as arrest the accused persons and to proceed in accordance with law; b) That this Honourable Court also be pleased to direct the respondents No.1 to 3 to provide adequate protection to the petitioner, her husband and her other family members; c)...... d)...... Learned counsel submits that the petitioner is complainant of Crime No.75/2025 Police Station Khanpur under Sections 395, 365, 427, 454, 148, 149, 220 PPC, which she lodged on 20.06.2025. Since investigation of said FIR was handed over to SIP/SIO Irshad Ali Abro, but the petitioner has got no faith in him therefore, she had maintained Crl. Misc. Appln. No.1241 of 2025 before the Court of Sessions Judge/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace Shikarpur in terms of Section 22-A (iii) Crf.P.C, which later was assigned to 1st Additional District & Sessions Judge/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace Shikarpur.

Appln. No.1241 of 2025 before the Court of Sessions Judge/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace Shikarpur in terms of Section 22-A (iii) Crf.P.C, which later was assigned to 1st Additional District & Sessions Judge/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace Shikarpur. The Ex-Officio Justice of Peace after due notice and hearing the parties had allowed the same by directing the DIGP Larkana to assign the reinvestigation of aforesaid FIR to well reputed police officer not below the rank of DSP preferably DSP Abdul Qudoos Kalwar. The petitioner approached to DIGP who by way of order No.Legal/DIGP/LRK/25898-900 dated 07.08.2025 assigned the investigation to DSP Toufique Ahmed Sadhayo of District Larkana. Hence the petitioner being aggrieved by that order has approached this Court for seeking implementation of the orders passed by the Court below. Admittedly application moved by the petitioner has already been disposed of by the Court below. As far as compliance is concerned, the Court below is competent to comply with its order by making correspondence with concerned. The petitioner has moved this petition which in our view is not competent. Accordingly and in view of above factual as well as legal position of the record, instant petition is not tenable, which is hereby disposed of along with listed applicaitons; however, the petitioner is at liberty to file proper application before the competent Court having jurisdiction if so advised. Judge Judge M Yousuf Panhwar/**
